lines.speaker: Produced by
lines.text: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller
Central Perk. Joey's sitting on the couch and Phoebe enters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, hey Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Listen, I need to ask you something. Ok, you know how my step dad's in prison.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (afraid) Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. Well, uhm... listen he was supposed to get a weekend furlough, so he'd come to the wedding tomorrow, but he just called and... uhm... well, apparently stabbing Iceman in the exercise yard just couldn't wait till Monday.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So he can't come?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, and so there's no one to walk me down the aisle and... well, I would just really love it if you would do it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Seriously?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, you've... you know, sort of been like a dad to me. I mean, you've always, you know, looked out for me and shared your wisdom...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I am pretty wisdomous.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So... what do you say?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Are you kidding? Phoebe, I would be honored. (they hug)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, thank you. I hope... I hope you know how much you mean to me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (takes her hand) Listen, I hope... that you know... (has difficulty saying it) I don't want you to see your father cry, GO TO YOUR ROOM!
OPENING CREDITS
Central Perk. Phoebe and Joey are sitting on the couch. A waitress brings a coffee and Phoebe wants to pay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh no, no, no, let your dad get this.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (her mobile phone rings) Oh, it's my wedding planner. She's driving me crazy! (she answers) Hello... Hey, ok, stop screaming! Ok? So, halibut. All right, so salmon, either way. I don't-I don't... it doesn't matter to me!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (she enters with a headset on and she's speaking into the microphone) Well, it matters to me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I don't care, so you pick!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Did you just hung up on me? (she hangs up too) All right, look, I need you at the rehearsal dinner tonight at 1800 hours.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-uh. Ok. What time is that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You don't know military time?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why, I must have been in missile training the day they taught that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Just subtract twelve.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok, so... 1800 minus twelve is... one thousand, seven hundred and...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (screaming) Six o'clock!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok. Hold on. (her mobile phone rings) Geller here! No! I said it has to be there by 4 o'clock. Goodbye. (she hangs up) Oh, how hard it is to make an ice sculpture?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ice sculpture? That sounds really fancy! I told you I just want a simple wedding.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Please... honey, leave the details to me. Now I wanna make this day as special for you as I can. Now, ok, I was thinking that the harpist should wear white.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What harpist? My friend Marjorie is playing the steel drums.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ooh... she backed out.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: She did? Why?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I made her. (Phoebe looks shocked) Steel drums don't really say "elegant wedding". Nor does Marjorie's overwhelming scent.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (looking angry) Hey! She will shower when Tibet is free.
The wedding rehearsal dinner.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You look great. I'm so glad we're having this rehearsal dinner, you know, I so rarely get to practice my meals before I eat them.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, what did we say was your one gift to us?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No stupid jokes. I thought that was for the actual wedding.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rehearse it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi! (he kisses Phoebe)

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Thanks for coming you guys.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, (he goes towards Mike in order to shake hands but Mike hugs him) hey, oh... I... I was-I was going for a hand shake.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Is that why your hand is pressed against my crotch?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That is why!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So Rach.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Where is Emma?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, Monica made me send her to my mother's. Apparently babies and weddings don't mix.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (coming) Are you still crying about your damn baby? Pheebs, you gotta keep the line moving, remember, 20 seconds per person. Your see these clowns all the time! (she takes off)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, you're Mike's parents, right?

lines.speaker: Mike's mother
lines.text: Yes, we are.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah, our little ones are growing up fast, uh?

lines.speaker: Mike's father
lines.text: How's that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You know, on the one hand you're happy for them, but on the other hand it's hard to let go.

lines.speaker: Mike's father
lines.text: Who in God's name are you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, I'm not that fond of you either, ok buddy? But I'm just trying to be nice for the kids!
cut to Ross, Chandler and Rachel

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Rachel) You know what I just realized? We have no idea what we're doing in the wedding tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, I thought we'd be groomsmen, but wouldn't they have asked us by now? When did they ask you to be their bridesmaid?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh... November?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I wanna say it's not looking good.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey Pheebs...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What's up?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uhm... you haven't told these guys what they're doing in the wedding yet.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Heh.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uhm... well, they're not in the wedding.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? (Ross and Chandler don't know what to say, so there's an embarrassing long pause)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, this is really awkward (staring at the floor) Oh, and I can leave!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm sorry you guys but, you know, Mike's got his brother and his friends from school so... you know, you were-you were... if it helps you, you were next in line, you just-you just missed the cut.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, man!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is like figure skating team all over again. (Phoebe and Ross glare at him astonished) I mean synchronized swimming. (they continue to glare) I mean- I mean the balance beam. (to Ross) Help me!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: FOOTBALL!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (looking at Phoebe eating something) Pheebs, spit that out, that has pork in it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! I though the pot stickers were supposed to be vegetarian!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, I changed them. I-I sent you a fax about it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't have a fax machine.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ah, well then there are gonna be a few surprises!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't believe we're gonna be the only people that aren't in this wedding.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know, I hate being left out of things.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And it's a wedding! It'd be weird if I'm not in it...

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Hey guys, how is it going?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Fine. We're just sitting here. Alone. Doing nothing. It's our rehearsal for tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Yeah look, about tomorrow, I... I've got a question for ya. I just found out that one of my groomsmen had had an emergency and can't make it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Who cares, AND?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: ...and I was wondering if... you know, maybe one of you guys... (Ross stands up)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'll do it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (standing up too) M-Me-me-me!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: You both wanna do it? Uhm... there's only room for one.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Pick me, I look great in a tux and I will not steal focus.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, Mike, no, no. You wanna pick me, I mean... watch! (he mimics the groommens way of walking down the aisle with a bridesmaid) Huh?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: You know, I really don't feel very comfortable making this decision. You know, Phoebe knows you better, I'm gonna let her choose. (he leaves)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Chandler) Well, if Phoebe's choosing, then say hello to Mike's next groomsman.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I will. But I will need a mirror... as he is me!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Please, you're going down!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You are going downer!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Is that what they say on the Figure Skating Team?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (almost crying) I wouldn't know, I didn't make it! (they hug)
Wedding rehearsal dinner. Joey and Mike are talking.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So, you know I'm filling in for Phoebe's step dad, tomorrow, right?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Yeah, yeah. Hey, thanks for doing that.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, hey, my pleasure. (he suddenly becomes very serious) So what are your intentions with my Phoebe?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I intend to marry her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, a wiseacre. (Mike looks bewildered). No, no, no, I understand you plan to support your wife by playing the piano? Isn't that kind of unstable?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: No more so than acting.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Strike two!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: You're right. She probably will support me. Hey, unless we move in with you, dad?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Strike three! You only get one more, Mike!
Cut to Chandler and Ross. Phoebe comes out of the ladies room and they run toward her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, what did you decide?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I decided to pee.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Mike didn't tell you? You have to chose one of us to be in your wedding. One of his groomsmen fell out.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh no, no. I can't choose between you two! I love you both so much!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Just not enough to put us in the original wedding party.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I don't wanna choose! It's (Rachel is walking by). Oh okay, wait. Rach! Listen I have a very special bridesmaid task for you today.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (excited and clapping her hands in front of her face) Goody, what is it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, there's a spot open for only one groomsman and you have to choose between Ross and Chandler. So good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What, what, what, no, I don't wanna do that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right, I guess I'll have to find a new bridesmaid.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'll do it! (Monica approaches)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok, it's 2100 hours. (to Phoebe) Time for your toast. (Mike appears)

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Do I have a minute to go to the bathroom?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You had a bathroom break at 2030. Pee on your own time, Mike! (to Phoebe and Mike). Now, in regard to the toast, okay, you wanna keep them short, nothing kills a rehearsal dinner like long speeches. Okay. You just get in, do your thing and get out!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Is that what you say to Chandler?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (very serious) It's 2101 and I am not amused. (pause). Ok, the bride and groom have a few words they'd like to say. (Everyone sits and Phoebe gets up)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok. Hello everyone and thank you all for being here tonight. So tomorrow's the big event and some of you might not know, but Mike and I didn't get off to the best start. (she reads a note). My friend Joey and I decided to fix each other up with friends so I, I... (Monica is twirling her hands in order to make Phoebe speed up her speech) oh I... hum... I gave it a lot of thought and I fixed him up with my friend Mary Ellen who couldn't be here tonight because... (Monica is tapping her watch with her finger) it's not important... she is in rehab. Anyway, so, ok, Joey said that he was fixing me up with his friend Mike, only he didn't have a friend Mike so he just brought, uhm, my Mike and, and (Monica clears her throat) but despite, you know... it got... it got good. Ok, I wanna take a moment to mention my mother, who couldn't be here...
Monica (rolling her eyes): oh God.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And... moment's over! (Rachel, Joey and Chandler all turn and look disapprovingly towards Monica but she just shrugs it off) So, ok, uh, I can forget that. I can forget that and uhm... (she's flipping cards skipping half of them) Oh this is funny! Oh, but you need to know that to... that, to... Oh, ok, well, uhm, I (Monica is miming CUT). Ok, ok, I, ok, I.... MONICA I CAN'T DO IT LIKE THIS! THIS IS MY WEDDING! OKAY, I DON'T WANT THIS (she mimes Monica's when she was twirling her hands) OR THIS (she taps her watch) OR THIS (she mimes CUT) OK? I JUST WANTED A SIMPLE WEDDING! WHERE MY FIANCEE CAN GO TO THE BATHROOM ANYTIME HE WANTS! (pause) You know what? You're done.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: YOU'RE FIRED! (mimes the CUT again) (pause and she raises her glass) Cheers! (Chandler raises his, smiling and Monica stares at him and he puts down his glass.)
Joey's apartment. Joey's having breakfast; Phoebe enters the room carrying her wedding dress.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Happy wedding day!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, happy my wedding day to you!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok-dokey, Joey, listen. This is gonna be bridesmaid central, all right? We're gonna have hair and make-up going on in the bathroom and oh, I had to move a couple of things in the fridge to make room for the corsages.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, man! I wouldn't have had breakfast if I knew there was going to be corsages!
Monica enters the room

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi. About last night... I know you are under a lot of stress and even though the things you said hurt me a little bit... My point is, uh, well, I'm willing to take my job back.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, well that's ok. I think you and I will do much better if you're just... here as a bridesmaid.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, is that so? Ok. If that's really what you want, then here... I give you the headset. Well, I don't really want to give you the headset. Well I guess if you're taking over, you should probably return these messages. (hands her a stack of papers with messages and calls to return)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wow, this is a lot!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh-huh, but I'm sure you can handle this. I mean, I have won awards for my organizational skills, but, uh, I'm sure you'll do fine.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You won awards?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Mm-mh. I printed them out on my computer.
Ross enters the room

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Where's Rach?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's in her room, why?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I have to talk to her about this groomsman situation, ok? I'm not gonna watch Chandler up there while I'm sitting in the seats like some chump! (he goes to Rachel's room, knocks the door and enters the room). (very fake gasp) Oh! My God! You're breathtaking!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What d'you want?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You haven't by any chance chosen a groomsman yet, have you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, Ross, c'mon, please! Don't make this harder than it already is!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm not! I'm making it easier! Pick me!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, Chandler said that it's really important to him too!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Listen, listen. Whoever you pick is gonna walk down the aisle with you! Now, I promise I won't say a word, but if you pick Chandler he's gonna be whispering stupid jokes in your ear the whole time!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, you are the lesser of two evils!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (waving his fist in the air in triumph) YES, YES!
Joey's apartment. Phoebe is talking at the phone, Monica is listening amused.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sven I don't understand what you're saying! What is wrong with the flowers? Lorkins? What the hell are lorkins?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know.
Mike enters the room).

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Listen, Mike, if you were Swedish and you were saying the word "lorkins" what flowers would that be?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (thinks a moment) Orchids?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Right there! That's why I'm marrying you!
Joey comes out from his room

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Mike) Hello Michael.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Joseph.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: May I have a word with you, please?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (looking around the room) This is... great...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Have a seat. (Mike sits on his bed, and Joey towers over him. He starts talking in an Italian godfather-type voice) Last night, I tried to welcome you into my family... and instead, you disrespect me... (shakes his head) I cannot allow this.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (not amused) Are you rehearsing for some really bad mafia movie?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: More back talk. And yes, I may be borrowing a few lines from my recent unsuccessful audition for "Family Honor 2: Thissa Time Itsa Personal."

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Joey, I kinda have a lot to do today, what do you want?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I want you to take this seriously! Phoebe is very very important to me, ok? And I wanna make sure that you are gonna take care of her.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (gets up) Joe, I love Phoebe. She's the single most important thing in my life. I'd die before I let anything happen to her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (very satisfied and smiling) That's what I wanted to hear! Because she's family, ok, and now you're gonna be family, and there is nothing more important in the whole world, than family.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: That must have been one lousy movie.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (almost crying) That was ME!
Monica and Chandler's apartment. Chandler is pacing and Rachel walks in.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, can I talk to you about this groomsman thing? If you pick Ross, he'll walk you down the isle just fine. But if you choose me, you'll be getting some comedy!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Even so, I think I'm gonna pick Ross.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Let me tell you why you need to pick me. (Goes to sit on the couch facing backwards to the kitchen. Rachel gets a chair and sits opposite him) See, when I was a kid, I was always left out of everything, you know, and it really made me feel... insecure. You know, I was always picked last in gym. Even behind that big fat exchange student who didn't even know the rules to baseball. I mean, this guy would strike out and then run to third. Anyway, If I'm the only one left out of this wedding, I just know that all those feelings are gonna come rushing back.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right fine, I pick you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (Getting up and raising his fist in victory) Y-Y-YEEESSS! Make "groom" for Chandler.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (not amused by his pun but forcing a smile anyway) Oh my...
Joey and Rachel's apartment. Phoebe is on the phone and Monica is nonchalantly "minding her own business".

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! We're gonna do it my way. (listens) Because your way is stupid! Alright I gotta go, I have another call, Reverend. (switches calls) Hello?
Mike and Joey come out of Joey's room

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm glad we had this little talk.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Yes. Yeah and thanks for all the wedding night advice. (walks away) That didn't make me uncomfortable at all! Alright, so I'll see everybody tonight?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Bye.
Mike opens the door and there is a gigantic ice sculpture standing in the doorway

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Uhm, did you guys know that there is a giant ice sculpture in the hall?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God, what's it doing here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Obviously enjoying this setback) Ugh, I guess it got sent to the billing address as opposed to the shipping address. (by now she can barely keep herself from smiling) Uh! What a pickle.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (starting to panic) Oh my God, everything is such a mess. Why is this happening to me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (staring at the ice sculpture) How bad do you want to stick your tongue on that? (They all glare at him)
Central Perk. Ross is getting coffee at the counter. Chandler walks in.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How's it going?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (smiling to himself) Good. I'm just getting some coffee. So I'm alert for the wedding.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (smiling to himself too) That's what I was doing too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (barely containing himself at this point) Well, you have fun tonight.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, I will.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Me too.
They walk passed each other, Ross towards the door, Chandler towards the counter, suddenly they turn around to face each other

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wait a minute, I know why I'm being such an ass, why are you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm not supposed to tell you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm not supposed to tell you!
Cut to Joey and Rachel's apartment. Chandler and Ross storm in looking very unhappy

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You told us both we could be in the wedding? (they both stare at Rachel)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, in my defense, you were not supposed to tell each other.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rachel, only one of us can do it, you have to choose. You and me together again. (he winks at her and Rachel looks disgusted)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Rach, Rach, knock knock.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'll tell you at the wedding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh.
Mike walks in.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Hey, I forgot my scarf.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know what, I can't do this. I don't know which one of you guys to pick.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Oh, you haven't picked yet. Oh good, 'cause I had an idea. I thought it would be fun if the third groomsman was my family dog. Chappy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? A dog? No! Rachel gets to choose.
all eyes turn to Rachel

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sarcastic) Wow, this is a tough one. I think I'm gonna have to go with the dog.
Ross and Chandler look shocked
Cut to Phoebe who is in the living room, still on the phone.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Alright, wait, so what you're saying is that the chef is at the Hamilton Club, but the food is not and the drinks are there, but the bartender is not? Are you, are you FREAKING KIDDING ME!?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (enjoying what she's seeing) How's it going?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (to Monica) Help me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I want you to be Crazy Bitch again.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Sounds moved) Really?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Nearly in tears) Please?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You really want me to come back?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: More than I wanna get married.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok people, we are back in business! (Gets her headset out of her purse) Oh God, we've missed you soo much! (takes all the notes from Phoebe) Ok, go and get your hair and make-up done, and I'll take care of everything.
Joey walks in

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, what are you guys gonna do?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (sounds scared already) About what?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The blizzard. I just saw on the news, it's like the worst snow storm in 20 years! They already closed all the bridges and tunnels. (Opens the curtains to reveal a snow storm outside)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ooh! But the band and the photographer are coming all the way in from New Jersey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't think they are.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Rachel) Haha! Looks like you're not going to be in the wedding either. (Looks at Phoebe) So sorry Pheebs.
Monica's apartment. They are all sitting around.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Putting down her phone) Well, the club lost it's power.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah according to the news, most of the city did.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Since when do you watch the news?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, for your information, since they hired a very hot weather girl.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Phoebe and Mike) I can't believe you guys aren't going to be able to get married today.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow, you know, it's so beautiful out there. You always wanted to get married outside. Why don't you guys just do it on the street?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, look, it's hardly snowing anymore. I mean you couldn't ask for a more romantic setting. This could be the simple wedding you've always wanted!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Turning to Mike) What do you think?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I think I wanna get married to you today.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Me too! (turning to Monica) Monica, do you think we could do it?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (thinking) AFFIRMATIVE!
Outside. They are a bunch of people arranging chairs, shoveling snow and making other preparations.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (walking around with her headset still on) OK LET'S GET THESE CHAIRS OUT HERE! Gunther, hit the Christmas lights. (He does so and the lights above the chairs light up. Monica looks satisfied) Okay, who left the ice sculpture (picks up a piece of ice from the ground) ON THE STEAM GRATE? (nobody answers)

lines.speaker: Mike's mom
lines.text: Michael!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Hey! You made it. Great! Chappy! Hi! (kisses his dad) Hi! (kisses his mom) Mom, I know getting married in the street isn't something you approve of...

lines.speaker: Mike's mom
lines.text: No... It's lovely. The lights and the snow. I could look at them forever.

lines.speaker: Mike's dad
lines.text: (leans in towards Mike) I crushed a pill and put it in her drink... (to his wife) Come on, sweetheart.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (to Chandler and Ross) You know, Chappy's too small to handle all this snow. Someone's gonna have to walk him down the aisle.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So technically, would this person be in the wedding?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I guess.

lines.speaker: Chandler and Ross
lines.text: I'll do it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, but Chandler, hello... Aren't you scared of dogs?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm not scared. (moves towards Mike and Chappy) I'll just take little Chappy and... (he backs out) HE CAN SENSE MY FEAR. MY THROAT IS EXPOSED.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (takes Chappy from Mike) Well, I guess I'm in the wedding then. Ha haaa... (smells Chappy) He stinks!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Level 1 alert. I repeat, level 1. This is not a drill. Okay we've got a situation. The minister just called. He's snowed in. He can't make it.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Oh, no!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh hey, don't worry. I'm still ordained from your wedding.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, you'd think I'd give up being a minister and start paying to ride the subway? Huhuh...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uhm, ministers don't ride the subway for free.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I had to read the Bible pretty carefully, but... yeah we do.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, if Joey does the ceremony, then we have to find someone else to walk Phoebe down the isle.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (quickly) I'll do it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'll...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Ross) Na ha ha... (to Chappy) Ne he he... (Ross moves Chappy to Chandler, who quickly backs away) Ah ah...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, Mike and Joey, get in position. Chandler, come with me. (they walk off, Ross looks down to Chappy, who he's holding and he gets a whiff of the dog's smell. He is clearly disgusted by it.)
Cut to inside Central Perk where Rachel is helping Phoebe. Chandler and Monica enter.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, Joey's doing the ceremony and Chandler's giving you away.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, okay. Hi new dad. (Chandler waves)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So, you're ready to do this?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uhuh, uhuh... Oh my God! This is really happening.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Phoebe, I'm so happy for you honey. (she gives her a kiss)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, thank you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I love you. (Phoebe leans in to kiss her.) Oh, wait, wait, wait! No hugs. The dresses... Oh what the hell. (the girls hug)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I love you guys.

lines.speaker: Rachel and Monica
lines.text: I love you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. (in her microphone) It's zero hour. All teams execute on my count. (to all) Let's get this bad boy on the road.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Monica) Is it okay that I want you to wear that head set in bed tonight?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (checking her clipboard) I have you scheduled for nudity at 2300 hours.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah! (Monica walks outside)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay Marjorie, hit it.

A woman with a steel drum and a guy with a xylophone start playing an instrumental version of "Can't Help Falling In Love" by Elvis Presley. A bridesmaid and a groomsman walk down the isle. Next are Rachel and Ross, who carries Chappy in his arms.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Geez Ross, you could have showered.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's the dog.
we cut to Monica

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Groomsman, groomsman, why are you just standing there, where is your bridesmaid? (into microphone) We've got a broken arrow. Bridesmaid down! (realizes) Oh, that's me.
She walks down the aisle with the groomsman. We cut to inside Central Perk, where Phoebe and Chandler are waiting.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ready?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (nervously) Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh wait, oh no. Wait.

She takes off the coat she was wearing over her wedding dress, which is violet and has a darker shade petticoat underneath which shows at one side where the dress is lifted up to about the height of her hip and connected to the petticoat. She's wearing a veil over her curly hair and a low cut top with straps only just hanging over her shoulders.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wow! Aren't you gonna be cold?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't care... I'll be my something blue.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You look beautiful.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank you.

They start to leave Central Perk. The band starts to play "Here, There and Everywhere" by the Beatles. The crowd rises from their seats. Phoebe and Chandler walk down the aisle. Phoebe really glows with happiness. So does Mike who watches her walk down the isle. When Phoebe and Chandler arrive, they kiss and Phoebe walks to her bridesmaids.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: My God! Aren't you freezing?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Na-ah.
the music ends

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Friends, family, dog... Thank you all for being here to witness this blessed event. The cold has now spread to my special place... so I'm gonna do the short version of this. Phoebe and Mike are perfect for each other. And I know I speak for every one here... when I wish them a lifetime of happiness. Who has the rings?
one of the groomsmen gives the rings to Joey

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (whispering to Phoebe) Okay...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: When I was growing up, I didn't have a normal mom and dad, or a regular family like everybody else, and I always knew that something was missing. But now I'm standing here today, knowing that I have everything I'm ever gonna need... You are my family. (She puts the ring on Mikes finger)

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Phoebe you're so beautiful. You're so kind, you're so generous. You're so wonderfully weird. Every day with you is an adventure, and I can't believe how lucky I am, and I can't wait to share my life with you forever. (He puts the ring on Phoebe's finger.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh wait, oh I forgot... and uhm... I love you... and you have nice eyes.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I love you too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh Joey...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chappy's heart rate has slowed way down.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, okay. Phoebe, do you take this man to be your husband?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I do.
Joey has a "Yeah you do" smile on his face

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Mike, do you take this woman to be your wife?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I do.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I now pronounce you... husband and wife.
Phoebe and Mike kiss

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I got married! (everyone applauds) Could someone get me a coat, I'm freaking freezing.
Mike takes off his coat to give to Phoebe and the steel band plays "The Wedding Song"
COMMERCIAL BREAK
The hallway between the two apartments. Chandler and Joey are walking up the stairs.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That really was an incredible wedding.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It was, yeah. I kind of don't want it to end. Hey, you wanna come in for a drink and a bite of corsage?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'd love to, but it's 2300 hours and I'm about to have the most organized sex anyone's ever had.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nice. Oh hey, what about Ross?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know. Maybe he hooked up with that hot girl he was talking to.
cut to the street in front of Central Perk where Ross is walking Chappy. He has a plastic bag in his hand.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on Chappy, do your business. MAKE! MA-AKE! I did not sign on for this.
THE END
